history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person is taking a mirror selfie with a white iPhone. The person has short, dark, messy hair that covers part of their face. They are wearing a white t-shirt with a repeating pattern of black text printed diagonally across it. The text appears to be in English, with phrases like "The most," "countless," and "secrets" visible, though some are reversed or partially obscured. The person's left hand is holding the phone, and their right arm is extended.

The background is a room with a mirror, reflected in which are shelves or surfaces with various items. There are some fabric items with green and white patterns, a green box, and what looks like a plastic bottle. The lighting is somewhat dim and diffused, creating a soft, slightly hazy effect. The overall color palette is muted, dominated by whites, grays, and the dark tones of the hair and text, with hints of green from the background items. The mood is casual and slightly introspective, typical of a personal selfie. The style of the image is candid and contemporary, with a slight vintage or lo-fi aesthetic due to the lighting and editing.
